exampleSentences: Anh ăn tất cả các loại rau, trừ rau mùi.
Mọi người đều đến dự tiệc, trừ Minh vì bận công việc.
Chị thích đi du lịch vào mọi mùa, trừ mùa mưa.

content.sentence: Tất cả mọi người đi ___ tôi.

notes_md:
**Trừ** most often means **“except” / “excluding.”** It’s used to remove someone or something from a group.

It usually comes after a general statement, then adds the thing being excluded.  

It also means **“to subtract”** in math (trừ 5, trừ tiền). As a verb, it often pairs with numbers or money.

Close synonym for “except”: **ngoại trừ** (more formal).

definitions.es: Restar; quitar un número de otro.
definitions.vi: Trừ; lấy đi một số từ một số khác.
definitions.en: To subtract; to take away a number from another.

example.es: Dos menos tres es igual a menos uno.
example.vi: Hai trừ ba bằng âm một.
example.en: Two minus three equals negative one.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He eats all kinds of vegetables, except parsley.
Everyone came to the party, except Minh because of work.
She likes to travel in every season, except monsoon season.
notes:
Trừ most often means “except” / “excluding.” It’s used to remove someone or something from a group.

It usually comes after a general statement, then adds the thing being excluded.  

It also means “to subtract” in math (trừ 5, trừ tiền). As a verb, it often pairs with numbers or money.

Close synonym for “except”: ngoại trừ (more formal).
